spec_match.rationale: Perfect validation of standard IndexedDB durability options ('strict' / 'relaxed') and transaction event lifecycles.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional benchmark tool. Displays dynamic timing bars, real-time statistical table generations, average counters, and customized verdict summaries.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Strong educational value explaining fsync flushes and SSD performance differences under SQLite's backend.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/5161589557821440 entry.

design_system.rationale: Clean contrast tables, elegant green and blue state progress indicators.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5161589557821440 at the bottom of the page.

summary: The durability-comparison is an excellent database benchmarking sandbox, but fails compliance due to a missing ChromeStatus link.
